question.text: Under Regulation 19 of SEBI (Intermediaries) Regulations, 2008, during an inspection, the intermediary must provide the inspecting authority access to which of the following?

answer.text: Books, accounts, records including telephone records and electronic records

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 6.3.1, under Regulation 19, it is the duty to produce books, accounts, records including telephone records and electronic records. **The Trap:** Some may think only financial records are required, but the scope is much broader. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The wide scope of inspection powers means intermediaries must maintain comprehensive record-keeping systems.
